title: Promote doctrine through explicit evidence and maturity gates
summary: A design finding advances through researched, synthesized, specified, implemented, tested, adopted and measured states without implying completion early.
guidance: Promotion requires a precise first-party source, bounded user need, complementary comparison for high-impact rules, cross-cutting risk review, anti-imitation decision, owner, verification and recheck date. Overrides and exceptions carry owner, reason, tests and expiry.
do: Publish maturity beside every component and pattern
Measure adoption and outcome after release
dont: Equate a live URL with current doctrine
Promote taste or social popularity directly to canon
verification: Content-graph validation plus human promotion checklist and quarterly maturity audit
